scripts.images: node -e "import('pdf-to-img').then(async({pdf})=>{const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),f=process.argv[1],d=path.join(path.dirname(f),'pages');fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});let i=1;for await(const p of await pdf(f,{scale:2})){fs.writeFileSync(path.join(d,('page_'+String(i++).padStart(2,'0')+'.png')),p);console.log('page '+(i-1));}})" --
scripts.build: npm run pdf -- $1 && npm run images -- ${1%.md}.pdf
